reviews.comment:
Muy Mala Atencion por parte del Sr Fabian Tapia supuesto encargado, Mal educado, soberbio no tiene capacidad para solucionar problemas propios del sistema de YPF/ACA. Realmente no merece el puesto hay personas con mejores capacidades, no creo ser el primero en recibir mala atención por parte de esta persona.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from Mr. Fabian Tapia, the supposed manager. He was rude, arrogant, and incapable of resolving issues specific to the YPF/ACA system. He truly doesn't deserve the position; there are people with far better skills. I'm not the first to have received poor service from him.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5aGNMcWJREAE
